creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Having installed the Poudriere-built package trying to start dino throws an immediate core dump

 > dino

** (dino:1691): ERROR **: 16:11:06.796: table.vala:162: Qlite Error: Create table at version: SQLite error: 1 - unknown tokenizer: unicode61
Trace/BPT trap(core dumped)

Also: There is no documentation/manpage or whatever
